recommendations.title: Primal: Tales of Savagery
recommendations.overview: Genndy Tartakovsky's Primal: Tales of Savagery features a caveman and a dinosaur on the brink of extinction. Bonded by tragedy, this unlikely friendship becomes the only hope of survival.

recommendations.title: Puppy!
recommendations.overview: The residents of Hotel Transylvania find their world turned upside-down when youngster Dennis gets a surprise monster-sized pet.

recommendations.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
recommendations.overview: When the old-old-old-fashioned vampire Vlad arrives at the hotel for an impromptu family get-together, Hotel Transylvania is in for a collision of supernatural old-school and modern day cool.

recommendations.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation
recommendations.overview: Dracula, Mavis, Johnny and the rest of the Drac Pack take a vacation on a luxury Monster Cruise Ship, where Dracula falls in love with the ship’s captain, Ericka, who’s secretly a descendant of Abraham Van Helsing, the notorious monster slayer.

recommendations.title: Hotel Transylvania
recommendations.overview: Welcome to Hotel Transylvania, Dracula's lavish five-stake resort, where monsters and their families can live it up and no humans are allowed. One special weekend, Dracula has invited all his best friends to celebrate his beloved daughter Mavis's 118

recommendations.title: Monster Pets: A Hotel Transylvania Short
recommendations.overview: Drac tries out some new monster pets to help occupy Tinkles for playtime.

recommendations.title: Dexter's Laboratory: Ego Trip
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Action, Drama
recommendations.overview: After Dexter is confronted with robots who wish to "destroy the one who saved the future," he uses his time machine to see how he saved it. They declare that they are here to destroy the one who saved the future, and make ready to attack Dexter. Dext

recommendations.title: WALL·E
recommendations.overview: After hundreds of years doing what he was built for, WALL•E— a robot designed to clean up the earth—discovers a new purpose in life when he meets a sleek search robot named EVE. EVE comes to realize that WALL•E has inadvertently stumbled upon the key

recommendations.title: Good Bye, Lenin!
recommendations.overview: Alex Kerner's mother was in a coma while the Berlin wall fell. When she wakes up he must try to keep her from learning what happened (as she was an avid communist supporter) to avoid shocking her which could lead to another heart attack.

recommendations.title: Stand by Me
